name: cvpr-paper-writing-skill
description: Codex plugin for writing CVPR/ICCV/ECCV-style papers in the official LaTeX template with Overleaf, experiment, and reviewer-risk checks.

interface.shortDescription: Write and format CVPR-style papers in the official LaTeX template.
interface.longDescription: A Codex skill/plugin for CVPR/ICCV/ECCV paper writing: official author-kit setup, main.tex plus paper.tex workflow, Overleaf formatting, claim/evidence/experiment traceability, and submission checks.
defaultPrompt: Set up an official CVPR LaTeX paper project.
Review this CVPR paper for claim and experiment gaps.
Draft a CVPR-style introduction in paper.tex.
